welcome.title: Meganom Eco-house
welcome.text: At Meganom, cozy eco-houses made of natural wood with a pine aroma await you. The complex is located near Cape Meganom — one of the most scenic spots on the southern coast of Crimea.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Meganom Eco-house hotel complex
about.description: At Meganom, cozy eco-houses made of natural wood with a pine aroma await you. The complex is located near Cape Meganom in the village of Mindalnoye, Sudak — one of the most scenic spots on the southern coast of Crimea.

territory.title: Territory
items: Well-maintained grounds with greenery and fish ponds
Named eco-houses made of natural wood
Parking with CCTV
BBQ zone with tandoor and grill
Traditional Russian banya with relaxation area
Playground and swimming pool
Outdoor fitness area with pull-up bars
Vineyard, terrace, garden and veranda
Fully equipped kitchens
Cape Meganom views from second-floor rooms
Quiet hours: 23:00 — 07:00

services.title: Services
items: Free shuttle to Meganom and Oyster beaches at 8:00, 12:00, and 17:00
Wi-Fi throughout the property
Laundry, iron, hairdryer
Towels and toiletries
Air conditioning and fridge in every room
TV and sofa bed in houses
Fishing trips available
Card payment accepted

nearby.title: Nearby
items: Meganom and Raketa beaches — 5–15 minutes
Mussel and oyster farm on the beach
Wood-fired pizzeria — 5 min walk
Tavrida art cluster
Solnechnaya Dolina winery — wine museum, tasting room, shop
Cafes and restaurants: Perchem, Pizza Coffee Sea, Vysota 1234, Slon v Udave

about.allRoomsInclude: All rooms include: Wi-Fi, air conditioning, fridge

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Photos of our complex and surroundings

items.author: Alexey G.
items.text: A wonderful quiet spot by the sea. Crystal clear water, an oyster farm right on the beach. The owners are very hospitable, everything for a comfortable stay.

items.author: Anastasia B.
items.text: Beautiful view of Cape Meganom from the second-floor balcony. The houses are cozy, smell of wood. Well-kept grounds with a pool and playground.

items.author: Dmitry L.
items.text: The owners Ekaterina and Andrey are incredibly welcoming people. The houses are clean with everything you need. The wood-fired banya is amazing!

items.author: Mikhail M.
items.text: Peace, nature, crystal clear sea. They organized a fishing trip — we caught horse mackerel! Shuttle to the beach three times a day, very convenient.

items.author: Olga K.
items.text: Perfect place for a family vacation. Kids loved the pool and fish ponds. Quiet, peaceful, close to nature.

items.author: Sergey V.
items.text: Beautiful place, fresh air with pine scent. Great BBQ area — tandoor and grill. There's a dirt road to the beach, better to drive.

sections.title: General Provisions
sections.content:
This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting the personal data of users of the Meganom Eco-house website. The Policy is developed in accordance with Federal Law No. 152-FZ of 27.07.2006 «On Personal Data».

By using the website and providing your personal data, the User agrees to the terms of this Policy.

sections.title: Data Controller
sections.content: The data controller is Meganom Eco-house, located at: 28 Baikalskaya St., Mindalnoye, Sudak, Crimea. Contact email: info@meganom-eco.ru.

sections.title: Purposes of Data Processing
items: Room booking and provision of hotel services
Communication with the user to confirm bookings
Processing payments and refunds
Improving service quality and website performance
Sending informational messages (with user consent)
Compliance with applicable legislation

sections.title: Categories of Data Processed
items: Full name
Contact phone number
Email address
Booking data (check-in/check-out dates, number of guests)
Website usage data (cookies, IP address, browser data)

sections.title: Rights of Data Subjects
sections.content: To exercise your rights, please send a request to info@meganom-eco.ru.
items: Obtain information about the processing of your personal data
Request correction, blocking or deletion of data
Withdraw consent to personal data processing
Lodge a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority

sections.title: Use of Cookies
sections.content: The website uses cookies to ensure correct operation, analytics and content personalisation. The User may disable cookies in their browser settings, but this may affect website functionality.
items: Necessary — ensure basic website functionality
Analytical — help understand how users interact with the website
Marketing — used to show relevant advertising

sections.title: Data Protection
sections.content: The data controller takes necessary organisational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorised access, destruction, modification, blocking, copying and dissemination.

sections.title: Policy Changes
sections.content: The data controller reserves the right to make changes to this Policy. The current version is always available on this page.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.content: For questions regarding personal data processing, please contact:
items: Email: info@meganom-eco.ru
Address: 28 Baikalskaya St., Mindalnoye, Sudak, Crimea

sections.title: General Provisions
sections.content:
These Terms of Use govern the relationship between Meganom Eco-house (hereinafter — the Administration) and the website user (hereinafter — the User).

Use of the website constitutes the User's unconditional acceptance of these Terms. If the User disagrees, they must stop using the website.

sections.title: Subject of the Agreement
sections.content: The Administration provides the User with access to information about hotel services, the ability to book rooms online, and other services available on the website.

sections.title: User Rights and Obligations
sections.content: The User agrees to provide accurate data when booking and not to use the website for unlawful purposes.
items: Access information about rooms and services
Book rooms through the website
Leave reviews about services received
Contact customer support
Not use the website for unlawful purposes
Not take actions that disrupt the normal operation of the website

sections.title: Administration Rights and Obligations
items: Modify website content without prior notice
Restrict access in case of violation of the Terms
Ensure website operability
Process personal data in accordance with the Privacy Policy
Review User requests within a reasonable time

sections.title: Booking and Payment
sections.content:
A booking is considered confirmed once the User receives a notification to the specified email address. The cost of accommodation is determined by the current rates published on the website.

Cancellation and refund conditions are governed by the rules in effect at the time the booking is made.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All website materials (texts, photographs, design, logos) are intellectual property of the Administration and are protected by applicable law. Use of materials without the Administration's written consent is prohibited.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The Administration is not liable for temporary unavailability of the website due to technical reasons and does not guarantee uninterrupted operation of the website.

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
sections.content: All disputes and disagreements shall be resolved through negotiations. If no agreement can be reached, the dispute shall be referred to a court at the Administration's location in accordance with applicable law.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.content: For questions related to these Terms, please contact:
items: Email: info@meganom-eco.ru
Address: 28 Baikalskaya St., Mindalnoye, Sudak, Crimea

footer.brand: Eco-houses near Cape Meganom. Tranquility, nature and the clean sea of southern Crimea.

eco-standart.title: Eco-house «Standard»
eco-standart.description: Cozy wooden house for two with garden view
eco-standart.fullDescription: A cozy eco-house made of natural wood for two guests. The light interior with wooden accents creates a genuine country retreat atmosphere. A spacious terrace with garden furniture is the perfect spot for morning coffee overlooking a beautiful garden. The house has everything you need for a comfortable stay: air conditioning, fridge, and high-speed Wi-Fi.

eco-comfort.title: Eco-house «Comfort»
eco-comfort.description: Spacious house with separate bedroom and veranda
eco-comfort.fullDescription: A spacious house with a separate bedroom and large veranda — the ideal choice for couples and small groups. The mini-kitchen lets you cook your own meals on your own schedule. The open veranda with comfortable garden furniture is the best place for quiet evening gatherings surrounded by Crimean nature.

eco-suite.title: Suite «Panorama»
eco-suite.description: Two-level house with panoramic sea view
eco-suite.fullDescription: A two-level house with breathtaking panoramic views of the sea and Cape Meganom. A full spacious kitchen, wide terrace with sun loungers, and a BBQ area create everything you need for an unforgettable stay. Accommodates up to 4 guests, each of whom will appreciate the magnificent Black Sea horizon right outside the window.

eco-family.title: Family «Deluxe»
eco-family.description: Large family house with children's area and garden
eco-family.fullDescription: A large family house with two sleeping areas, a children's bed, and a spacious full kitchen. A huge terrace with a BBQ area opens onto a cozy private garden — children will find their favourite play space here. The perfect solution for families with children who want space, privacy, and everything they need close at hand.

roomDetail.notFoundText: The requested room does not exist or has been removed.

rooms.introText: Each house is built from natural wood and set into the landscape near Cape Meganom. Choose the accommodation that suits your space and budget.
rooms.ctaText: Contact us — we'll help you find accommodation that fits your preferences and budget.

bookingPage.successText: We will contact you shortly to confirm your booking.
bookingPage.noRoomSelected: Select a room from the list

faq.intro: We've gathered answers to the most common questions from our guests. Didn't find what you need? Call us — we're always happy to help.
faq.ctaText: Contact us and we'll get back to you within a few hours.

items.q: How do I book a room?
items.a: Choose a room and dates on the booking page, fill in your contact details and submit the request. Our manager will contact you within 2 hours to confirm. You can also call us directly: +7 (978) 123-45-67.
A deposit of 30% of the total stay is required after booking confirmation. The remaining amount is paid upon arrival by cash or card.

Cancellations more than 7 days before check-in are free of charge and the deposit is fully refunded. Cancellations within 7 days are non-refundable. Cancellations within 48 hours incur a charge of the first night's rate.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept cash and bank cards (Mir, Visa, Mastercard) upon arrival. The deposit can be paid by bank transfer — we'll send the details after booking confirmation.

items.q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
items.a: Standard check-in is from 14:00, check-out by 12:00. Early check-in or late check-out can be arranged in advance subject to availability — please let us know when booking.
Yes, there is a secure, monitored car park with CCTV on the grounds. Parking is free for all guests.

items.q: Is airport or station transfer available?
items.a: We offer free shuttle transfers to the Meganom beaches on a daily schedule. Transfers from Simferopol Airport or Feodosia railway station can be arranged for an additional fee — enquire when booking.
The minimum stay is 2 nights. During peak season (July–August) the minimum stay is 3 nights.

items.q: Do the cabins have a kitchen?
items.a: Comfort, Suite and Deluxe cabins have a kitchenette with fridge, electric hob, kettle and cookware. Standard cabins have a fridge. All guests have access to the shared BBQ kitchen area on the grounds.
Yes, free high-speed Wi-Fi is available in all cabins and throughout the grounds — fast enough for remote work and video calls.
All cabins have air conditioning. This is especially important during the hot Crimean summer.

items.q: Is there a sauna or banya?
items.a: Yes! Our traditional Russian wood-fired banya is one of the highlights of the complex. It's available by reservation; birch and oak whisks are provided. Ask for pricing when booking.
There is an outdoor pool open during the summer season from May to October. Access is free for all guests.

items.q: How far is it to the sea?
items.a: The complex is about 5–7 minutes by car from the beach at Cape Meganom. Our free shuttle to the beach runs several times a day.

items.q: How do I get here from Simferopol?
items.a: By car: 1 hour 40 minutes via Belogorsk to Sudak, then 10 minutes to Mindalnoye village. By bus: take the Simferopol–Sudak route, then a taxi (10–15 min). We'll send the exact address and GPS coordinates after booking confirmation.

items.q: Are there shops and cafes nearby?
items.a: Bogatovka village, 2 km away, has grocery shops. Sudak (15 minutes by car) offers full city amenities: markets, restaurants, pharmacies and ATMs.

Absolutely! We welcome families with children of all ages. A baby cot is available on request at no extra charge. There's a play area on the grounds, and our shuttle runs to family-friendly beaches in Sudak.
Yes, we welcome guests with pets up to 10 kg. Please let us know when booking. A refundable cleaning deposit of 500 roubles applies.
Smoking is permitted only in designated outdoor areas. Smoking inside cabins and enclosed spaces is strictly prohibited.

The main season runs from April to October. From November to March some cabins operate in 'quiet season' mode — banya, nature and peaceful relaxation away from the summer crowds. Please check availability when booking off-season.
